info.title: Helix Commerce API
info.description: Catalog, configuration, orders, and auth API for the Helix Product Bus.

tags.name: Config
tags.description: Per-site configuration: allowed origins, delivery sites, auth toggle, and reCAPTCHA settings. One config document per org/site. Optional `geoOverrides` entries are deep-merged over the base config for requests whose resolved country matches, letting one site serve multiple countries (e.g. distinct order ID prefixes) from the same domain.

tags.name: Catalog
tags.description: Retrieve, create/replace, or delete a product by path. The literal path `/*` selects bulk mode: POST an array of products (max 50 per request).

tags.name: Indices
tags.description: Create or delete a query index identified by a path ending in `/index.json`. Creating an index queues existing products under that path for indexing.

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Merge-patch the order custom data map. Each key/value is capped at 2048 characters; a null value removes the property.

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Initiate a payment for an order. Entry point for starting a payment flow — the client picks a provider/payment method and supplies an idempotency key. Guest checkout is supported (no auth required).

tags.name: Customers
tags.description: A single address or order belonging to a customer.

tags.name: Estimate
tags.description: Computes a cart estimate. `estimateType` selects the calculation: `tax` (tax rate for an address), `shipping` (available shipping rates), `price` (promotions + coupon + auto-rule discounts), or `order` (per-method totals including tax and shipping). No authentication required.

tags.name: Places
tags.description: Origin-gated proxy to Google Places (New) and the Address Validation API. `action` selects the operation: `autocomplete`, `details`, or `validate`. Access is allowed only for requests whose Origin matches the site config.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Clears the `auth_token` cookie and revokes the token if a valid one is presented (via cookie or bearer header). Always responds 204, even when no/invalid token is presented.

tags.name: Coupons
tags.description: Retrieve, update, or delete a single coupon type.

get.description: Returns the stored configuration document for the org/site.

404.description: No configuration exists for this org/site.

post.description: Validates and stores the configuration document, replacing any existing one.

400.description: The configuration failed schema validation.

requestBody.description: The full configuration document to store.

delete.description: Removes the configuration document for the org/site.

post.description: Unified bulk catalog endpoint. Accepts an `{ items }` envelope and, by default, creates or updates (upserts) each product (max 50 per request). Every item is validated up front, so a single invalid product rejects the whole request and saves nothing. Always responds with a `results` array, one entry per item, including for single-item requests. A `delete: true` flag is reserved for bulk deletion in a future release.

200.description: Per-item results for the bulk operation.

schema.description: Bulk operation result: one entry per attempted item.

items.description: Outcome of a single product write or delete.

etag.description: Opaque strong validator of the written product (successful writes only).

400.description: Invalid envelope: non-object body, non-boolean delete, non-array items, too many items, or an invalid product.

requestBody.description: Bulk operation envelope with an `items` array of products to upsert.

schema.description: Bulk operation envelope. Writes are the default; `delete: true` selects deletion.

items.description: Products to create or update (max 50 per request).

delete.description: When true, the request is a bulk delete. Defaults to false (write).

get.description: Returns a page of product summaries (sku, name, path). Pass a `cursor` (from a prior truncated response) to page through results.

schema.description: A page of catalog product summaries.

truncated.description: Whether more results are available beyond this page.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; present only when truncated.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Product path (e.g. `/us/en/products/blender-pro-500.json`), or the literal `*` for bulk writes.

get.description: Returns the stored ProductBus entry for the given path.

ETag.description: Opaque strong validator for the stored product. Send it back as `If-Match` on a later write or delete for optimistic concurrency.

400.description: The path is malformed.

post.description: Deprecated: use `POST /{org}/sites/{site}/catalog` (the collection root) instead, which shares one request/response envelope. Only valid at the literal `/*` path. Accepts an array of products (max 50); each is validated against the ProductBus schema and written. Unchanged products are skipped (reported with status 200).

schema.description: Write result. `product` is set for single-item writes, `products` for bulk writes.

product.description: Outcome of a single product write or delete.

etag.description: Opaque strong validator of the written product (successful writes only).

items.description: Outcome of a single product write or delete.

etag.description: Opaque strong validator of the written product (successful writes only).

400.description: Invalid request: not an array, too many products, missing path, or invalid product.

405.description: Method not allowed at this path.

requestBody.description: Array of products to upsert. Each entry must include `path`.

put.description: Validates the product against the ProductBus schema and writes it. The `path` in the body, if present, must match the URL path. Supports `If-Match` / `If-None-Match` for optimistic-concurrency control; a successful write returns the new `ETag`.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: Conditional request. `"<etag>"` proceeds only if the current eTag matches; `*` proceeds only if the product exists. Returns `412` when unmet.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional request. `*` proceeds only if the product does not exist (create-only). Returns `412` when the product already exists.

200.description: Conditional update result (returned when an If-Match write succeeds).

ETag.description: The new opaque strong validator for the stored product.

schema.description: Write result. `product` is set for single-item writes, `products` for bulk writes.

product.description: Outcome of a single product write or delete.

etag.description: Opaque strong validator of the written product (successful writes only).

items.description: Outcome of a single product write or delete.

etag.description: Opaque strong validator of the written product (successful writes only).

ETag.description: The new opaque strong validator for the stored product.

schema.description: Write result. `product` is set for single-item writes, `products` for bulk writes.

product.description: Outcome of a single product write or delete.

etag.description: Opaque strong validator of the written product (successful writes only).

items.description: Outcome of a single product write or delete.

etag.description: Opaque strong validator of the written product (successful writes only).

400.description: Validation failure or body/URL path mismatch.

412.description: A conditional request precondition (If-Match / If-None-Match) was not met.

500.description: A conditional storage write failed. The request may be retried.

requestBody.description: The product to store.

delete.description: Deletes the product at the given path. Supports `If-Match` / `If-None-Match` for conditional deletes; a precondition miss returns `412` and the product is left in place.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: Conditional request. `"<etag>"` proceeds only if the current eTag matches; `*` proceeds only if the product exists. Returns `412` when unmet.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional request. `*` proceeds only if the product does not exist (create-only). Returns `412` when the product already exists.

items.description: Outcome of a single product write or delete.

etag.description: Opaque strong validator of the written product (successful writes only).

400.description: Wildcard delete attempted, or malformed path.

412.description: A conditional request precondition (If-Match / If-None-Match) was not met.

500.description: A conditional storage delete failed. The request may be retried.

get.description: Returns the registry of query indices, each with its last-modified timestamp.

schema.description: The registry of query indices for a site.

lastModified.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last modification.

post.description: Creates a query index for the given path. The index path is the directory portion of the URL (the trailing `/index.json` is stripped). No request body.

400.description: Path is missing, does not end with `/index.json`, or is otherwise invalid.

409.description: Index already exists, or the registry was modified concurrently.

502.description: Registry or index storage update failed.

delete.description: Deletes the query index for the given path and removes it from the registry.

400.description: Path is missing or does not end with `/index.json`.

404.description: No index exists at the given path.

get.description: Returns orders for the org/site, optionally filtered by creation time range and state. Admin-only.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer token. `Bearer <jwt>`. Must carry the `admin` role.

403.description: Caller lacks the orders:read permission, the admin role, or org/site mismatch.

post.description: Validates the order, verifies item prices/countries (or a signed estimateToken locking in tax/shipping/discounts), creates the customer if needed, and persists the order. The optional customerTimezone field stores the shopper browser timezone for customer-facing uses, such as formatting order confirmation email timestamps. reCAPTCHA-gated for unauthenticated callers.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer token. `Bearer <jwt>`. Optional — guest checkout is supported.

parameters.name: X-Recaptcha-Token
parameters.description: reCAPTCHA Enterprise token; required for unauthenticated callers.

200.description: The created order, wrapped as `{ order }`.

400.description: The order failed schema validation, or the estimateToken was invalid/expired/mismatched.

403.description: Authenticated caller lacks orders:write, has an org/site mismatch, or email mismatch.

422.description: An unauthorized free ($0) item was requested beyond the estimate token grant.

requestBody.description: The order to create.

get.description: Returns the order. Non-admin/non-service callers may only read their own order (matched on customer email).

403.description: Caller lacks orders:read, org/site mismatch, or email mismatch.

404.description: No order with this id (visible to the caller).

403.description: Caller lacks orders:write or has an org/site mismatch.

post.description: Computes tax, shipping, and discounts for the cart against the selected shipping method and returns a signed estimateToken. reCAPTCHA-gated for unauthenticated callers.

parameters.name: X-Recaptcha-Token
parameters.description: reCAPTCHA Enterprise token; required for unauthenticated callers.

200.description: The estimate: subtotal, tax, shipping method, discounts, total, lineItems, and a signed estimateToken.

400.description: The preview body failed validation, shippingMethod.id is missing, or the selected method is unavailable.

422.description: An unauthorized free ($0) item was requested with no matching free-item grant.

requestBody.description: The cart to estimate. `shippingMethod.id` is required.

patch.description: Merges the request body into the order custom data. Keys with a null value are removed. Each key and value is limited to 2048 characters.

200.description: The updated order, wrapped as `{ order }`.

400.description: The custom data failed validation (non-object, non-string value, or over the 2048-char limit).

errors.message: custom data must be an object

403.description: Caller lacks orders:custom:write or has an org/site mismatch.

requestBody.description: A flat map of custom keys to string values (or null to delete).

post.description: Validates the request, looks up the payment provider, enforces the pending order-state guard (with idempotent replay), and delegates to the provider. Returns the provider result (synchronous charge outcome or a requires_action redirect). No authentication required.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer token. `Bearer <jwt>`. Optional — guest checkout is supported.

200.description: The provider result (terminal charge outcome or a requires_action redirect).

400.description: Missing required body field, unknown provider, or provider-specific input validation failure.

422.description: Order not payable (not pending), provider not configured, max attempts exceeded, or provider rejection.

502.description: The payment provider returned an upstream error.

503.description: Attempt persistence failed after retries for a redirect provider; retry with the same idempotencyKey.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation request. `provider`, `paymentMethod`, and `idempotencyKey` are required; `fraudToken` is the optional fraud SDK session token.

provider.description: Registered provider name (e.g. chase, chase-wallet, paypal, paypal-express, affirm).

idempotencyKey.description: Caller-supplied idempotency key; replays return the prior result.

fraudToken.description: Optional fraud-provider JS SDK session token.

get.description: Returns customers for the org/site. Paginated via an opaque `cursor` when the R2 page is truncated.

200.description: The list of customers (and an optional pagination cursor).

post.description: Validates and stores a new customer. Often called unauthenticated during checkout.

400.description: The customer failed schema validation.

409.description: A customer with this email already exists.

requestBody.description: The customer to create.

get.description: Returns the customer. Requires ownership of the email and membership of the org/site (no `customers:read` permission).

404.description: No customer exists for this email.

delete.description: Removes the customer. Admin role required.

404.description: No email supplied in the path.

get.description: Lists the customer's addresses (`subroute=addresses`) or orders (`subroute=orders`). Listing orders requires `orders:read`; both require ownership of the email.

200.description: The list of addresses or orders.

post.description: Creates an address for the customer (`subroute=addresses` only). Requires ownership of the email.

400.description: The address failed schema validation.

requestBody.description: The address to create.

get.description: Retrieves a single address (`subroute=addresses`, requires ownership of the email) or a single order (`subroute=orders`). Order lookup is intentionally unauthenticated: knowing email + orderId is treated as sufficient proof for guest order-status lookups, so a bearer token is optional on this operation.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer token. `Bearer <jwt>`. Required for address lookups; omit for guest order-status lookups.

404.description: No such address or order for this customer.

put.description: Replaces a single address (`subroute=addresses`). Requires ownership of the email.

400.description: The address failed schema validation.

404.description: No such address for this customer.

409.description: The replacement address duplicates another saved address.

requestBody.description: The replacement address.

delete.description: Deletes a single address (`subroute=addresses`). Requires ownership of the email.

404.description: No such address for this customer.

post.description: Request shape depends on `estimateType`. All variants accept a partial shipping address and (for price/shipping/order) a cart `items` array and optional `couponCode`. An optional BCP-47 `locale` (e.g. `fr-CA`) selects the localized shipping-method label column; the base label is used when it is absent or has no matching column.

200.description: The computed estimate. Body shape varies by `estimateType`.

400.description: The request failed schema validation or `country` could not be resolved.

requestBody.description: Estimate request. Shape varies by `estimateType`; see route description.

get.description: For `autocomplete`, provide `input` (and optional `sessiontoken`, `regioncode`). For `details`, provide `place_id` (and optional `sessiontoken`). The proxied Google response is returned verbatim.

200.description: The proxied Google Places response (passed through verbatim).

400.description: Required input (`input` or `place_id`) was missing.

403.description: Request Origin is missing or not in the site's allowed origins.

429.description: Per-IP rate limit exceeded (120 requests/minute per tenant). Retry after the window resets.

value.message: rate limit exceeded, retry in 60 seconds

500.description: The Google Places API key is not configured.

502.description: The upstream Google API failed or was unreachable.

post.description: Same actions as GET, plus `validate`: provide `address.addressLines` (non-empty array) and optional `address.regionCode`. Returns a normalized verdict envelope.

200.description: For `validate`, a normalized envelope (`action`, `formattedAddress`, `addressComponents`, `uspsDeliverable`). For `autocomplete`/`details`, the proxied Google response.

400.description: A required field was missing or invalid (e.g. empty `address.addressLines`).

403.description: Request Origin is missing or not in the site's allowed origins.

429.description: Per-IP rate limit exceeded (120 requests/minute per tenant). Retry after the window resets.

value.message: rate limit exceeded, retry in 60 seconds

500.description: The Google Places API key is not configured.

502.description: The upstream Google API failed or was unreachable.

requestBody.description: Request body. Shape varies by `action`; see operation description.

200.description: OTP challenge; pass these values to /auth/callback.

schema.description: Opaque OTP challenge — echo `email`, `hash` and `exp` back to the callback.

hash.description: HMAC of the issued code; must be returned to /callback.

exp.description: Expiry timestamp (ms epoch) of the OTP code.

400.description: Missing/invalid email, country, or locale.

401.description: Auth is not enabled for this org/site and the caller is not an existing admin.

requestBody.description: Email to send the OTP code to, plus optional locale hints.

schema.description: OTP login request. Hand-validated by the handler (no runtime schema).

email.description: Email address to send the OTP code to.

post.summary: Verify an OTP code and obtain a session token

200.description: Authenticated; JWT issued in body and `auth_token` cookie.

Set-Cookie.description: auth_token=<jwt>; HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Strict; Path=/; Max-Age=86400

schema.description: Issued JWT plus resolved identity. Token is also set as the `auth_token` cookie.

400.description: Missing/invalid email, code, hash, or exp.

401.description: Invalid/expired/used code, or rate limit exceeded.

500.description: Server misconfigured or internal error creating the token.

requestBody.description: The code plus the challenge values returned by /auth/login.

schema.description: OTP verification request. Hand-validated by the handler (no runtime schema).

code.description: The OTP code the user received by email.

post.summary: Log out and clear the session cookie

Set-Cookie.description: auth_token=; Max-Age=0; Path=/; HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Strict

get.description: Returns coupon code names, optionally filtered by `type` and/or `active`, with cursor-based pagination.

200.description: List of coupon code names with an optional pagination cursor.

schema.description: A page of coupon code names with an optional pagination cursor.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when there are no more.

post.description: Creates a single coupon code referencing an existing coupon type. A `discountOverride` is rejected when the referenced type is a product-list coupon.

400.description: Missing code/typeId, invalid code format, referenced coupon type not found, or a discountOverride on a product-list type.

409.description: A coupon with this code already exists.

requestBody.description: The coupon code to create.

post.description: Generates `count` (max 500) unique codes with an optional `prefix`, all referencing the given coupon type.

201.description: The generated code count and code names.

schema.description: The generated code count and names.

400.description: Missing typeId, or referenced coupon type not found.

requestBody.description: Batch parameters.

put.description: Merges the request body into the existing coupon. `code`, `typeId`, `usageCount`, and `createdAt` are immutable. A `discountOverride` is rejected when the referenced type is a product-list coupon.

400.description: A discountOverride was set on a code of a product-list coupon type.

errors.message: not allowed for a product-list coupon type

requestBody.description: Partial coupon code fields to merge into the existing code.

get.description: Returns all coupon type objects for the org/site.

schema.description: A list of coupon type objects.

types.description: Coupon type objects — each a FlatCouponType or a ProductListCouponType.

post.description: Validates and stores a coupon type. `id` and `name` are required, plus exactly one discount shape: a flat `discountType`/`discountValue`, or a "product list coupon" `discountedProducts` array. The two shapes are mutually exclusive, as are `country`/`countries`; included/excluded products and categories may not overlap.

400.description: Validation failed (missing/invalid fields, mutually exclusive fields, category overlap, duplicate discountedProducts).

409.description: A coupon type with this id already exists.

requestBody.description: The coupon type to create — either a flat or a product-list coupon.

404.description: No coupon type with this id.

put.description: Merges the request body into the existing coupon type. `id` and `createdAt` are immutable. Setting `country` clears `countries` (and vice versa); switching between the flat and product-list shapes clears the opposing fields. Switching to the flat shape requires both `discountType` and `discountValue`.

400.description: Validation failed (mutually exclusive fields, category overlap, invalid country/locale, incomplete flat discount).

404.description: No coupon type with this id.

requestBody.description: Partial coupon type fields to merge into the existing type.

delete.description: Deletes the coupon type. Blocked with 409 if any codes still reference it.

404.description: No coupon type with this id.

409.description: Coupon codes still reference this type.

ProductBus.description: A Product Bus catalog entry representing a single product or configurable product.

urlKey.description: URL key used to construct the canonical path.

mpn.description: Manufacturer Part Number. Used as a product identifier when no GTIN is available.

productType.description: Merchant-defined product category, e.g. "Home > Kitchen > Blenders".

googleProductCategory.description: Google product taxonomy category, as a numeric taxonomy ID or full category path.

url.description: Canonical absolute URL for the product.

availability.description: schema.org availability status for a product or offer.

availabilityDate.description: ISO 8601 date when the product becomes available.

price.description: Price information for a product or variant.

final.description: Final price the customer pays, as a decimal string (e.g. "19.99").

regular.description: Original price before any discount, as a decimal string.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key/value metadata attached to the product.

options.description: Configurable options available for this product (e.g. Color, Size).

items.description: A configurable product option with its available values (e.g. Color, Size).

id.description: Option identifier, typically matching the attribute code.

label.description: Display label for the option group (e.g. "Color").

items.description: A single selectable value for a product option.

id.description: Unique identifier for this option value.

value.description: Display label for this option value (e.g. "Red", "Large").

uid.description: Internal UID used by some backends.

aggregateRating.description: Aggregate customer rating for schema.org structured data.

ratingValue.description: Average rating value. Numeric string; converted to a number in JSON-LD.

reviewCount.description: Total number of ratings. Numeric string; converted to an integer in JSON-LD.

items.description: Product media asset. An image, or a video when the video field is set.

label.description: Accessible alt text for the image.

roles.description: Semantic roles assigned to this image, e.g. "thumbnail".

video.description: Absolute URL of an associated video asset, when this media entry represents a video.

variants.description: Available variants for a configurable product.

items.description: A purchasable variant of a configurable product.

price.description: Price information for a product or variant.

final.description: Final price the customer pays, as a decimal string (e.g. "19.99").

regular.description: Original price before any discount, as a decimal string.

items.description: Product media asset. An image, or a video when the video field is set.

label.description: Accessible alt text for the image.

roles.description: Semantic roles assigned to this image, e.g. "thumbnail".

video.description: Absolute URL of an associated video asset, when this media entry represents a video.

mpn.description: Manufacturer Part Number. Used as a product identifier when no GTIN is available.

availability.description: schema.org availability status for a product or offer.

availabilityDate.description: ISO 8601 date when the variant becomes available.

options.description: Option values that identify this variant (e.g. color=Red, size=Large).

items.description: A single selectable value for a product option.

id.description: Unique identifier for this option value.

value.description: Display label for this option value (e.g. "Red", "Large").

uid.description: Internal UID used by some backends.

jsonldExtensions.description: Additional schema.org properties shallow-merged into this variant's Offer in the auto-generated JSON-LD. Max 16,000 characters when serialized.

weight.description: Product weight for display and JSON-LD structured data.

shippingDimensions.description: Physical dimensions used for shipping rate calculation.

weight.description: Product weight for display and JSON-LD structured data.

jsonld.description: Full JSON-LD override. When present, replaces the auto-generated structured data.

jsonldExtensions.description: Additional schema.org properties shallow-merged into the auto-generated Product JSON-LD object. Ignored when jsonld override is used. Max 32,000 characters when serialized.

anyOf.description: A single shipping option in Google Merchant Center format.

price.description: Shipping cost with currency code (e.g. "16.00 USD").

min_handling_time.description: Minimum order handling time in business days.

max_handling_time.description: Maximum order handling time in business days.

min_transit_time.description: Minimum shipping transit time in business days.

max_transit_time.description: Maximum shipping transit time in business days.

items.description: A single shipping option in Google Merchant Center format.

price.description: Shipping cost with currency code (e.g. "16.00 USD").

min_handling_time.description: Minimum order handling time in business days.

max_handling_time.description: Maximum order handling time in business days.

min_transit_time.description: Minimum shipping transit time in business days.

max_transit_time.description: Maximum shipping transit time in business days.

bundleItems.description: Bundle composition. Presence of this array (regardless of contents) marks this product as a bundle.

items.description: One entry in a bundle product's composition. May be a simple item (sku + price) or a configurable item (variants array). Presence of the parent product's bundleItems array marks it as a bundle.

sku.description: SKU for a simple bundle item.

name.description: Display name for a simple bundle item.

price.description: Price for a bundle component. Narrower than ProductBusPrice -- no currency field (currency comes from the parent line item).

final.description: Component price as a decimal string.

variants.description: Variants for a configurable bundle item. When present, the server selects one variant at preview time.

items.description: One variant of a configurable bundle item. The server selects the variant whose options are all satisfied by the parent line item's selectedOptions.

price.description: Price for a bundle component. Narrower than ProductBusPrice -- no currency field (currency comes from the parent line item).

final.description: Component price as a decimal string.

options.description: Option pairs that identify this variant.

items.description: Option pair on a configurable bundle item variant. The server resolves which variant to ship by matching every entry here against the parent line item's selectedOptions.

name.description: Option value label, matched against selectedOptions[].value.

taxCode.description: Per-variant tax classification code. Falls back to the bundle parent's taxCode when absent.

taxData.description: Supplementary tax data. Falls back to the bundle parent's taxData when absent.

taxCode.description: Per-component tax classification code. Falls back to the bundle parent's taxCode when absent.

taxData.description: Supplementary tax data. Falls back to the bundle parent's taxData when absent.

common.description: Common feed settings shared across product distribution channels.

oai.description: Product feed eligibility for the OpenAI / agentic commerce feed.

isEligibleForSearch.description: Whether the product is eligible for search feeds.

isEligibleForCheckout.description: Whether the product supports checkout via feeds.

weight.description: Product weight for display and JSON-LD structured data.

shippingDimensions.description: Physical dimensions used for shipping rate calculation.

weight.description: Product weight for display and JSON-LD structured data.

taxCode.description: Tax classification code for this product.

taxData.description: Supplementary tax data passed to the tax provider.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale tag for this product entry.

items.description: A single line item in an order or estimate.

name.description: Display name for this line item.

note.description: Optional customer note for this line item.

imageUrl.description: Product image URL for order confirmation display.

quantity.description: Quantity ordered. Must be a whole number from 1 to 1000.

price.description: Price information for a product or variant.

final.description: Final price the customer pays, as a decimal string (e.g. "19.99").

regular.description: Original price before any discount, as a decimal string.

shippingDimensions.description: Physical dimensions used for shipping rate calculation.

weight.description: Product weight for display and JSON-LD structured data.

selectedOptions.description: Option values selected by the customer.

items.description: A customer-selected option value for a line item (e.g. color=Red).

bundleItems.description: Resolved bundle component line items nested on a bundle parent. Not counted toward the order subtotal -- the parent price is the chargeable value.

items.description: A resolved bundle component line item nested on a bundle parent order item.

path.description: Product page path of the component.

quantity.description: Quantity ordered. Must be a whole number from 1 to 1000.

price.description: Price information for a product or variant.

final.description: Final price the customer pays, as a decimal string (e.g. "19.99").

regular.description: Original price before any discount, as a decimal string.

custom.description: Arbitrary custom data for this line item.

checkoutFlow.description: Checkout flow type. `express` identifies wallet or shortcut checkout flows.

entryPoint.description: Page or experience where checkout started.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default address for the customer.

isValidated.description: Whether this address has been validated by an address verification service.

items.description: A single line item in an order or estimate.

name.description: Display name for this line item.

note.description: Optional customer note for this line item.

imageUrl.description: Product image URL for order confirmation display.

quantity.description: Quantity ordered. Must be a whole number from 1 to 1000.

price.description: Price information for a product or variant.

final.description: Final price the customer pays, as a decimal string (e.g. "19.99").

regular.description: Original price before any discount, as a decimal string.

shippingDimensions.description: Physical dimensions used for shipping rate calculation.

weight.description: Product weight for display and JSON-LD structured data.

selectedOptions.description: Option values selected by the customer.

items.description: A customer-selected option value for a line item (e.g. color=Red).

bundleItems.description: Resolved bundle component line items nested on a bundle parent. Not counted toward the order subtotal -- the parent price is the chargeable value.

items.description: A resolved bundle component line item nested on a bundle parent order item.

path.description: Product page path of the component.

quantity.description: Quantity ordered. Must be a whole number from 1 to 1000.

price.description: Price information for a product or variant.

final.description: Final price the customer pays, as a decimal string (e.g. "19.99").

regular.description: Original price before any discount, as a decimal string.

custom.description: Arbitrary custom data for this line item.

checkoutFlow.description: Checkout flow type. `express` identifies wallet or shortcut checkout flows.

entryPoint.description: Page or experience where checkout started.

Customer.description: Customer contact information provided at checkout.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default address for the customer.

isValidated.description: Whether this address has been validated by an address verification service.

FlatCouponType.description: A coupon type applying a flat percentage or fixed discount. Mutually exclusive with the product-list shape (`discountedProducts`).

minimumOrderAmount.description: Minimum pre-discount subtotal required to apply. Defaults to 0.

maximumDiscountAmount.description: Cap on the discount amount (percentage coupons); null for no cap.

includedShippingTypes.description: When set, free shipping applies only to these shipping method types.

stackable.description: Whether the coupon stacks with cart-level auto pricing rules. Defaults to true.

autoApply.description: Apply automatically without manual code entry. Defaults to false.

allowManualEntry.description: Allow the code to be entered manually at checkout. Defaults to true.

defaultUsageLimit.description: Default total usage limit for codes of this type; null for unlimited.

defaultUsesPerCode.description: Default per-code usage limit; null for unlimited.

country.description: Single ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country the coupon is valid in. Mutually exclusive with `countries`.

countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 countries the coupon is valid in. Mutually exclusive with `country`.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale the coupon is scoped to.

createdAt.description: Creation timestamp (ISO 8601). Managed by the service; ignored on write.

updatedAt.description: Last-update timestamp (ISO 8601). Managed by the service; ignored on write.

discountType.description: Whether `discountValue` is a percentage or a fixed cash amount.

discountValue.description: Discount magnitude — a percentage (0–100) when `discountType` is "percentage", otherwise a cash amount. Defaults to 0.

includedProducts.description: When non-empty, only these products count toward the coupon. Each entry is a path string or a `{ path, sku? }` object.

excludedProducts.description: Products excluded from the coupon. Each entry is a path string or a `{ path, sku? }` object.

excludeDiscountedProducts.description: When true, apply only to full-price lines (regular price equals sale price).

applyToSalePrice.description: When false (default) the discount is computed against the regular price with cheaper-wins; when true it stacks on the current sale price.

ProductListCouponType.description: A coupon type that sets absolute per-product prices via `discountedProducts`. The entries define their own scope; mutually exclusive with the flat discount and scoping/pricing fields (`discountType`, `discountValue`, `includedProducts`, `excludedProducts`, `includedCategories`, `excludedCategories`, `excludeDiscountedProducts`, `applyToSalePrice`).

minimumOrderAmount.description: Minimum pre-discount subtotal required to apply. Defaults to 0.

maximumDiscountAmount.description: Cap on the discount amount (percentage coupons); null for no cap.

includedShippingTypes.description: When set, free shipping applies only to these shipping method types.

stackable.description: Whether the coupon stacks with cart-level auto pricing rules. Defaults to true.

autoApply.description: Apply automatically without manual code entry. Defaults to false.

allowManualEntry.description: Allow the code to be entered manually at checkout. Defaults to true.

defaultUsageLimit.description: Default total usage limit for codes of this type; null for unlimited.

defaultUsesPerCode.description: Default per-code usage limit; null for unlimited.

country.description: Single ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country the coupon is valid in. Mutually exclusive with `countries`.

countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 countries the coupon is valid in. Mutually exclusive with `country`.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale the coupon is scoped to.

createdAt.description: Creation timestamp (ISO 8601). Managed by the service; ignored on write.

updatedAt.description: Last-update timestamp (ISO 8601). Managed by the service; ignored on write.

discountedProducts.description: Per-product absolute price overrides. Exact duplicates (same path, or same path + sku) are rejected.

CouponTypeUpdate.description: Partial coupon type fields to merge into the existing type. `id` and timestamps are immutable.

minimumOrderAmount.description: Minimum pre-discount subtotal required to apply. Defaults to 0.

maximumDiscountAmount.description: Cap on the discount amount (percentage coupons); null for no cap.

includedShippingTypes.description: When set, free shipping applies only to these shipping method types.

stackable.description: Whether the coupon stacks with cart-level auto pricing rules. Defaults to true.

autoApply.description: Apply automatically without manual code entry. Defaults to false.

allowManualEntry.description: Allow the code to be entered manually at checkout. Defaults to true.

defaultUsageLimit.description: Default total usage limit for codes of this type; null for unlimited.

defaultUsesPerCode.description: Default per-code usage limit; null for unlimited.

country.description: Single ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country the coupon is valid in. Mutually exclusive with `countries`.

countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 countries the coupon is valid in. Mutually exclusive with `country`.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale the coupon is scoped to.

discountType.description: Whether `discountValue` is a percentage or a fixed cash amount.

discountValue.description: Discount magnitude — a percentage (0–100) when `discountType` is "percentage", otherwise a cash amount. Defaults to 0.

includedProducts.description: When non-empty, only these products count toward the coupon. Each entry is a path string or a `{ path, sku? }` object.

excludedProducts.description: Products excluded from the coupon. Each entry is a path string or a `{ path, sku? }` object.

excludeDiscountedProducts.description: When true, apply only to full-price lines (regular price equals sale price).

applyToSalePrice.description: When false (default) the discount is computed against the regular price with cheaper-wins; when true it stacks on the current sale price.

discountedProducts.description: Per-product absolute price overrides. Exact duplicates (same path, or same path + sku) are rejected.

DiscountedProduct.description: Maps a product path (optionally a variant via `sku`) to an absolute final per-unit price.

path.description: Product path the price applies to.

sku.description: Optional variant SKU. Omit to match any variant at the path. A path + sku entry takes precedence over a path-only entry for the same line.

anyOf.description: Price as a decimal string, e.g. "19.99".

CouponCode.description: A single coupon code referencing a coupon type.

code.description: The coupon code (case-insensitive; normalized to uppercase). Letters, digits, hyphens, underscores; max 64 chars.

typeId.description: Identifier of the coupon type this code draws its discount from.

discountOverride.description: Overrides the coupon type's flat discount for this code. Not allowed when the type is a product-list coupon.

usageLimit.description: Total redemption limit; null for unlimited.

usageCount.description: Times redeemed. Managed by the service; ignored on write.

usesPerCustomer.description: Per-customer redemption limit; null for unlimited.

expiresAt.description: Expiry timestamp (ISO 8601). Omit for a code that never expires.

active.description: Whether the code can be redeemed. Defaults to true.

createdAt.description: Creation timestamp (ISO 8601). Managed by the service.

updatedAt.description: Last-update timestamp (ISO 8601). Managed by the service.

CouponCodeUpdate.description: Partial coupon code fields to merge into the existing code. `code`, `typeId`, `usageCount`, and timestamps are immutable.

discountOverride.description: Overrides the coupon type's flat discount for this code. Not allowed when the type is a product-list coupon.

usageLimit.description: Total redemption limit; null for unlimited.

usesPerCustomer.description: Per-customer redemption limit; null for unlimited.

expiresAt.description: Expiry timestamp (ISO 8601). Omit for a code that never expires.

active.description: Whether the code can be redeemed. Defaults to true.

BatchCreateCouponsRequest.description: Parameters for batch-generating unique coupon codes for an existing type.

typeId.description: Coupon type the generated codes reference.

count.description: Number of codes to generate (max 500). Defaults to 1.

discountOverride.description: Overrides the coupon type's flat discount for this code. Not allowed when the type is a product-list coupon.

usageLimit.description: Total redemption limit for every code; null for unlimited.

usesPerCustomer.description: Per-customer redemption limit for every code; null for unlimited.

expiresAt.description: Expiry timestamp (ISO 8601) applied to every generated code.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error envelope returned for non-2xx responses.

code.description: Machine-readable error code (also sent as the `x-error-code` header).

message.description: Human-readable error message (also sent as the `x-error` header).

resource.description: The resource type involved, when applicable.

retryable.description: Whether the caller may retry the request.

ValidationErrorResponse.description: Error envelope returned when the request body fails schema validation.

path.description: JSON path to the offending value, e.g. `$.allowedOrigins[0]`.

message.description: What was wrong at this path.
